message:
feat(genome): initFromRoot saves manifest only, no agent file copy

initFromRoot no longer copies root agent .md files into the genome's
agents/ directory. It loads root agents into memory and saves a manifest
for future syncRoot. Factory and export-learnings pass rootDir to Genome
constructor. Tests updated to use overlay-aware Genome construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
